items.headline: 2 S&P 500 Stocks on Our Buy List and 1 We Avoid
items.summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.

items.headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Clorox (CLX) After A Tough Year For The Stock Price
items.summary: This article examines whether Clorox now looks like a bargain or still appears expensive after a difficult stretch for the stock, and walks through what the current price might be implying. Clorox shares last closed at US$94.14. The stock is up 4.6% over the past week and 4.6% over the past month, but is still showing a decline of 6.7% year to date and a decline of 23.0% over the past year.
